name: JRiver Media Center
description: JRiver Media Center is a comprehensive media management application for audio, video, images, and television. This LXC runs MC35 with a headless Xvnc display accessible via VNC on port 5901.

notes.text: A JRiver Media Center license is required. Purchase at https://www.jriver.com/
Access the GUI via any VNC client on port 5901 (e.g. vnc://CONTAINER_IP:5901).
Run `jriver-configure` inside the container to set a VNC password, restart services, or update MC.
Installation uses the installJRMC community script (https://github.com/cryobry/installJRMC) which manages JRiver repo setup, updates, and VNC services.
